member.name: T:AkUtilities.MigrationStep
member.summary: These values represent the maximum value of the "Unity Integration Version" number in the Version.txt file that will migrated. For example, in Wwise v2019.1.0, "Unity Integration Version" is 18 which means that all migrations up until this version are required.

member.name: F:AkUtilities.MigrationStep.Current
member.summary: The value that is currently in the Version.txt file.

members.member: Executes a command-line. Blocks the calling thread until the new process has completed. Returns the logged stdout in one big string.
Reads the user settings (not the project settings) to check if there is an override currently defined for the SoundBank generation folders.

member.name: M:AkUtilities.MoveFolder(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Renames or moves a folder using UnityEditor.Database API.
member.returns: Returns true if the operation was successful.

members.member:
This function returns the absolute position and the width and height of the last drawn GuiLayout(or EditorGuiLayout) element in the inspector window. This function must be called in the OnInspectorGUI function
The inspector must be in repaint mode in order to get the correct position Example => if(Event.current.type == EventType.Repaint) Rect pos = AkUtilities.GetLastRectAbsolute();

member.name: T:AkUtilities.ShortIDGenerator
member.summary: This is based on FNVHash as used by the DataManager to assign short IDs to objects. Be sure to keep them both in sync when making changes!

member.name: T:AkBasePathGetter
member.summary: This class is responsible for determining the path where sound banks are located. When using custom platforms, this class needs to be extended.

member.name: T:AkBasePathGetter.CustomPlatformNameGetter
member.summary: User hook called to retrieve the custom platform name used to determine the base path. Do not modify platformName to use default platform names.
member.param: The custom platform name. Leave unaffected if the default location is acceptable.

member.name: M:AkBasePathGetter.GetPlatformName
member.summary: Determines the platform name which is also the sub-folder within the base path where sound banks are located for this platform.

member.name: M:AkBasePathGetter.GetPlatformBasePath
member.summary: Returns the absolute path to the platform specific sound banks.
member.returns: The absolute path to the platform specific sound banks.

member.name: M:AkBasePathGetter.GetFullSoundBankPathEditor
member.summary: Returns the absolute path to the folder above the platform specific sound banks sub-folders.
member.returns: The absolute sound bank base path.

member.name: M:AkBasePathGetter.GetPlatformBasePathEditor(System.String)
member.summary: Determines the platform base path for use within the Editor.
member.param: The platform name.
member.returns: The full path to the sound banks for use within the Editor.

members.member:
@brief Contains C# functions exposed from the Wwise C++ API.
The AkSoundEngine class contains functions converted to C# from the following C++ namespaces: - AK::Monitor - AK::MusicEngine - AK::SoundEngine - AK::SoundEngine::DynamicDialogue - AK::SoundEngine::Query - AK::SpatialAudio

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.StringFromIntPtrString(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Converts "char*" C-strings to C# strings.
member.param: "char*" memory pointer passed to C# as an IntPtr.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.StringFromIntPtrWString(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Converts "wchar_t*" C-strings to C# strings.
member.param: "wchar_t*" memory pointer passed to C# as an IntPtr.

member.name: T:AkSoundEngine.GameObjectHashFunction
member.summary: The type for hash functions used to convert a Unity Game Object into an integer.
member.param: The Unity Game Object.
member.returns: The AkGameObjectID used by the sound engine.

member.name: P:AkSoundEngine.GameObjectHash
member.summary: The user assignable hash function used to convert a Unity Game Object into an AkGameObjectID used by the sound engine. Used by GetAkGameObjectID().

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.GetAkGameObjectID(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: The hash function used to convert a Unity Game Object into an AkGameObjectID used by the sound engine.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.RegisterGameObj(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Registers a Unity Game Object with an ID obtained from GetAkGameObjectID().
member.param: The Unity Game Object.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.RegisterGameObj(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a Unity Game Object with an ID obtained from GetAkGameObjectID().
member.param: The Unity Game Object.
The name that is visible in the Wwise Profiler.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.UnregisterGameObj(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Unregisters a Unity Game Object with an ID obtained from GetAkGameObjectID().
member.param: The Unity Game Object.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.PreGameObjectAPICallUserHook(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.UInt64)
member.summary: User hook called within all Wwise integration functions that receive GameObjects and do not perform (un)registration. This is called before values are sent to the native plugin code. An example use could be to register game objects that were not previously registered.
member.param: The GameObject being processed.
The ulong returned from GameObjectHash that represents this GameObject in Wwise.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.PostRegisterGameObjUserHook(AKRESULT,UnityEngine.GameObject,System.UInt64)
member.summary: User hook called after RegisterGameObj(). An example use could be to add the id and gameObject to a dictionary upon AK_Success.
member.param: The result from calling RegisterGameObj() on gameObject.
The GameObject that RegisterGameObj() was called on.
The ulong returned from GameObjectHash that represents this GameObject in Wwise.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.PostUnregisterGameObjUserHook(AKRESULT,UnityEngine.GameObject,System.UInt64)
member.summary: User hook called after UnregisterGameObj(). An example use could be to remove the id and gameObject from a dictionary upon AK_Success.
member.param: The result from calling UnregisterGameObj() on gameObject.
The GameObject that UnregisterGameObj() was called on.
The ulong returned from GameObjectHash that represents this GameObject in Wwise.

member.name: M:AkSoundEngine.StringFromIntPtrOSString(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Converts "AkOSChar*" C-strings to C# strings.
member.param: "AkOSChar*" memory pointer passed to C# as an IntPtr.

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager
member.summary: This class manages the callback queue. All callbacks from the native Wwise SDK go through this queue. The queue needs to be driven by regular calls to PostCallbacks(). This is currently done in AkInitializer.cs, in LateUpdate().

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager.EventCallback
member.summary: Event callback used when posting events.

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager.MonitoringCallback
member.summary: Monitoring callback called when Wwise reports errors.

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager.BankCallback
member.summary: Bank callback called upon bank load and unload and when errors occur.

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager.EventCallbackPackage
member.summary: This class holds the data associated with an event callback.

member.name: T:AkCallbackManager.BankCallbackPackage
member.summary: This class holds the data associated with a bank load or unload callback.

members.member: Call this to set a function to call whenever Wwise prints a message (warnings or errors).
Call this to set a background music callback function. By default this callback is not defined.
This function dispatches all the accumulated callbacks from the native sound engine. It must be called regularly. By default this is called in AkInitializer.cs.

member.name: M:AkBaseArray`1.DefaultConstructAtIntPtr(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: This method is called for each element of the array when the array is constructed. It should be used to clear the memory associated with an element so that it will be seen as if it had been default constructed.
member.param: The address of the element

member.name: M:AkBaseArray`1.ReleaseAllocatedMemoryFromReferenceAtIntPtr(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: This method is called for each element of the array when the array is disposed. It should be used to delete memory allocated by elements.
member.param: The address of the element

members.member: @brief Maintains the list of loaded SoundBanks loaded. This is currently used only with AkAmbient objects.
Loads a SoundBank. This version blocks until the bank is loaded. See AK::SoundEngine::LoadBank for more information.
Loads a SoundBank. This version returns right away and loads in background. See AK::SoundEngine::LoadBank for more information.
Unloads a SoundBank. See AK::SoundEngine::UnloadBank for more information.
Loads a bank. This version blocks until the bank is loaded. See AK::SoundEngine::LoadBank for more information.
Loads a bank. This version returns right away and loads in background. See AK::SoundEngine::LoadBank for more information
Loads a bank. This version blocks until the bank is loaded. See AK::SoundEngine::LoadBank for more information.

member.name: T:AkAudioInputManager
member.summary: This class represents an example audio input manager and is responsible for managing the audio sample and format callbacks provided to the Wwise Audio Input plug-in.

member.name: T:AkAudioInputManager.AudioFormatDelegate
member.summary: Sanitized audio format delegate to be used by classes that implement audio input plug-ins. The samples are ALWAYS set to be non-interleaved 32-bit float.
member.param: The playingID of a sound that uses the audio input plug-in.
The C# analog of the C++ AkAudioFormat class.

member.name: T:AkAudioInputManager.AudioFormatInteropDelegate
member.summary: Audio format delegate that is sent to C++.

member.name: T:AkAudioInputManager.AudioSamplesDelegate
member.summary: Sanitized audio sample delegate to be used by classes that implement audio input plug-ins. For every event posted, this delegate is called once per audio frame for each channel until the delegates for all the channels associated with this event return false.
member.param: The playingID of a sound that uses the audio input plug-in.
The number of the channel associated with this specific invocation of the delegate.
The sample array that MUST be filled even when returning false.
member.returns: Return true when more sample frames are require and false when complete.

member.name: T:AkAudioInputManager.AudioSamplesInteropDelegate
member.summary: Audio sample delegate that is sent to C++.

member.name: M:AkAudioInputManager.PostAudioInputEvent(System.UInt32,UnityEngine.GameObject,AkAudioInputManager.AudioSamplesDelegate,AkAudioInputManager.AudioFormatDelegate)
member.summary: This method is used to post events that use the Wwise Audio Input plug-in.
member.param: The ID of the event to post.
The GameObject that the event will be posted on.
The C# audio sample delegate.
The C# audio format delegate. If not specified, defaults to a mono source running at the sample rate of the sound engine.
member.returns: The playingID of the newly instantiated sound associated with the posted event.

member.name: M:AkAudioInputManager.PostAudioInputEvent(System.String,UnityEngine.GameObject,AkAudioInputManager.AudioSamplesDelegate,AkAudioInputManager.AudioFormatDelegate)
member.summary: This method is used to post events that use the Wwise Audio Input plug-in.
member.param: The name of the event to post.
The GameObject that the event will be posted on.
The C# audio sample delegate.
The C# audio format delegate. If not specified, defaults to a mono source running at the sample rate of the sound engine.
member.returns: The playingID of the newly instantiated sound associated with the posted event.
